review_title: Good simple tool For recording user activity
description: I love using this tool but may have to find a different tool because of price
author: Garwin P.
pros: Does an excellent job in recording not only screen activity but network and location information.
cons: the price between free and the next teir send to high. Also does not have a mobile version.

review_title: Great software, powerful and detailed, a bit complicated to use at first but you get used to it quite fast.
description: I was hesitant at first when my company changed from FullStory to LogRocket because I was already an expert using FS, but I was surprised after my first week using LR of how powerful is and how detailed the information can be.
author: Gus B.
pros: It gives a lot more detail than other tools, at first it might look challenging because it has so many options, but you can get used to it in matter of a few days.
cons: The user interface could be a little more user-friendly, I understand it is a tech tool and as such it can't be super simple, but smoother edges and maybe slightly larger buttons could help a bit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Front End monitoring tool
author: Will R.
pros: Able to look at real user sessions and pick out bugs.
cons: What is represented in the session log is not a 100% true representation of what the user saw.

review_title: A bang for your buck at a tenth of the price of its competitor
description: First of all, I was looking for a simple solution to just monitor
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Setting up was really easy and straight forward. Also, the documentation for setting it up with different frameworks was very useful. Also it provides integration with services like Sentry which is really useful in our industry we you don't really get to have a test and a production environment
cons: There wasn't much to not like about this.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helpful in understanding user needs and debugging the product
description: Its been really helpful for our team overall in understanding what is going on with the way users interact with our product. I highly recommend using it for product teams.
author: Emily T.
pros: It is really easy to take a look through recent sessions each day and understand where users are getting stuck and which issues we might need to solve urgently. My eng team also likes using it to debug when needed.
cons: I'd love some more insights served up in a sort of report that isn't manual or doesn't require me to go do the digging myself.

review_title: A very powerful product
author: Kailu G.
pros: Log rocket was very simple to use. Our engineering team uses it on a weekly basis for bug catching and troubleshooting for our product. Also, other non-dev team members use Logrocket to troubleshoot as well. The interface was very intuitive.
cons: I am very happy overall with Logrocket.

review_title: A Must Have Solution - LogRocket
author: Celina M.
pros: I like the website analytics as well as website testing and bug tracking.
cons: No major issues as LogRocket has been helpful.

review_title: Use this product, your users will thank you.
description: I used it at my last company Sworkit and at my new startup Table Needs. I consider it an essential part of any web based product business.
author: Ben S.
pros: LogRocket is an essential part of our business. We review it each morning to glean information about how the previous night of service went throughout our userbase and it catches things that users do not report more times than not.
cons: There are some issues still with the ionic framework on ios, but I think this is more on safari than the LogRocket folks. But, they are all aware of it (LogRocket and Ionic) and I am hopeful a fix will be implemented.

review_title: Good Product, Lightweight
description: Overall a very lightweight product. Really helped us in capturing sessions
author: Varun B.
pros: It captures the user sessions really well. Extremely lightweight so no impact on your application performance. Helps us resolve production issues with valid data
cons: They really need to work on mobile SDK and get the product ready to capture android and ios sessions
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Product Managers Analytics Tool
description: Overall, this is an excellent tool and a huge part of my day to day activities however with the time required to train the members of my team, I would prefer using tools like Mixpanel
author: Kevin F.
pros: As a Product Manager, I am highly dependent on LogRocket on a daily basis. Providing deep insights into the data it collects through powerful visualizations and analytics for daily analysis and debugging
cons: With most of my team being experienced in other tools, training them to use this was trouble. Additionally, until my team was experienced in using this tool, they needed one expert user to navigate this tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Essential software for customer support and UX
description: The perfect software to use for your developers, designers and support teams to improve your website and app. No complaints!
author: Nikola S.
pros: Logrocket allows you to view how people that visited your site interacted with all of your pages and the app you built. It's essential software if you want to improve the UX/UI of your website or tool. We use it with our designer, when we want to redesign landing pages, and also with our support team when a customer complaints about a bug and we can view his session and confirm where the bug is and solve it for him.
cons: There's nothing I don't like about Logrocket. The only thing I would say is that it takes up a lot of energy for the computer to run, so if you have other programs running in the background, it could slow down your computer, or get a little buggy. But the value Logrocket provides far outweighs this con.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Platform Support
author: Peter B.
pros: We maintain a SaaS portal with 1000's of subscribers. Being able to replay a session enables us to spot user errors, or issues that effect the user experience and that is enormously helpful!
cons: We have to use a separate product to manage the back end of our application and it would be helpful if we could use one solution to see both the client and the server side. LogRocket is without peer when it comes to monitoring the client side.

review_title: Amazing tool
description: Whole team was amazed first time we tried it out and we purchased it immediately. It super good to see in realtime how users are using our platform and to address bugs.
author: Ensar M.
pros: Super easy to configure, easy to navigate and to view user recordings.
cons: I don't have anything specific. I know that there are some features like advanced statistics and insights but haven't tried it since we don't have a need for it currently. It would be good to try out for free.

review_title: See what the customers sees.
author: Sander L.
pros: Bughunting: Logrocket shows you the steps a customer makes. Therefore is easy to reproduce steps wich triggers an error
cons: Replay speed can not be slowed down. A speed of .5 would be a welcome addition.

review_title: The engineering version of FullStory for a fraction of the price
description: We use LogRocket as a customer support tool as well as for debugging purposes.
author: Corey P.
pros: Being able to view network requests out of the box is HUGE, followed closely by tracking Vuex mutations.
cons: I'd like to be able to add avatars to users. Honestly there's not much I don't like.

review_title: LogRocket - The saviour for devs
author: Ben B.
pros: Ever had a user report a bug that you cant replicate? Now you don't need to. Simply replay the users session with your app. Logs and all included. This is invaluable!
cons: I have had some sessions not recorded or cut out too soon. But this is infrequent

review_title: Hien Log Rocket Review
description: Overall I like logrocket alot it sucha a pretty good tool to get thing going
author: Hien T.
pros: I like the fact that it record your session
cons: It doesn't work so well over vpn because it asn't able to record the css aspect of our intranet dashboard. The document to enable it work better over VPN doesn't seem to be helpful are very hard to figure out.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Does everything I need and more
description: It's a must have software for Customer Success and Customer Support. It helps me with analytics, finding users' issues and solving them in the shortest possible time. It does everything I need and just works great.
author: Bartosz P.
pros: What I like in particular is watching sessions live. It's great for tracking user issues and guiding them on the go how to do something in an app. It's a life saver for customer support.
cons: Probably the aesthetic is the weakest part of this product. I could be much more modern.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Software that is necessary for UX and assistance to customers
author: Sunil A.
pros: Simply said, Logrocket enables you to see how visitors engaged with all of your sites and the custom app you created. If you want to enhance the UX/UI of your website or tool, you must use this program.
cons: It would be beneficial if we could use one solution to view both the client and the server side instead of having to utilize a different product to handle the back end of our program.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It's a blessing and a curse, but a MUST.
author: Andrew V.
pros: Well you learn a lot about how your users behave and try to use your site in odd ways. You find yourself wondering who on earth would use a screen with such odd resolutions, and you force yourself to look at your application in I.E. 11.
cons: Maybe optionally have it capture some specific XHR/Rest calls. Maybe show what tags are firing via GTM.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great, affordable option to watch user logs
author: Allie F.
pros: We’ve had a great experience with LogRocket — we use it every day. It’s easy to navigate and critical to seeing how users interact across our site. One of the most affordable options to do so on the market.
cons: Only thing we’d add is to have heat-mapping and more analytics—Which I understand they include at higher pricing levels.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great product, easy to use, helps find issues for our guests
author: Janos M.
pros: I love the replay functionality and that I can see the network requests made by the users.
cons: Nothing really, I like this software and like using it

review_title: Logrocket helped us understand our audience
description: It's been great, support is good, it's easy to use.
author: Gbolade O.
pros: Being able to have such insight into how our audience interacts with our website.
cons: It doesn't have heatmaps, which I would have liked bundled with the other features
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: User logs for web applications (And hybrid mobile apps)
description: Solves the problem of fixing bugs in early releases
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Entire replays of user activity which makes debugging a whole lot easier.
cons: The price can be made a little more competitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: LogRocket saves my butt
author: EJ J.
pros: Makes it super easy to search for sessions, events, errors, etc
cons: Still looking for something to dislike about it!
